description: Azure Container Apps dashboard providing individual Container App performance, scaling, and resource utilization.

options.content:
This dashboard is app-based, displaying key metrics for a container app using Azure Monitor metrics and Azure Resource Graph. 

In case of issues, please ensure that:

1. The [Azure Monitor data source is enabled](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/managed-grafana/how-to-data-source-plugins-managed-identity?tabs=azure-portal).
2. You have chosen a Container App that is not an [add-on](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/container-apps/services). 
3. The time range is correct.

Read more about monitoring your Azure Container Apps [here](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/container-apps/observability).

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId =~ '$sub'
| where resourceGroup =~ '$rg'
| where type =~ '$ns'
| where name =~ '$res'
| extend props = todynamic(properties)
| extend 
    provisioningState = tostring(props.provisioningState),
    workloadProfileName = tostring(props.workloadProfileName),
    latestRevisionName = tostring(props.latestRevisionName),
    activeRevisionMode = tostring(props.configuration.activeRevisionsMode),
    runningStatus = tostring(props.runningStatus),
    minReplicas = toint(props.template.scale.minReplicas),
    maxReplicas = toint(props.template.scale.maxReplicas),
    containers = props.template.containers
| mv-expand container = containers
| extend
    workloadType = iif(isempty(workloadProfileName), "NA - Consumption Only", iif(workloadProfileName =~ "Consumption", "Consumption", "Dedicated"))
| extend 
    image = tostring(container.image),
    cpu = todouble(container.resources.cpu),
    memory = todouble(trim_end("Gi", tostring(container.resources.memory)))
| project 
    ['Workload Type'] = workloadType,
    ['Latest Revision Name'] = latestRevisionName,
    ['Revision Mode'] = activeRevisionMode,
    ['Image'] = image,
    ['Min Replicas'] = minReplicas,
    ['Max Replicas'] = maxReplicas,
    ['Status'] = runningStatus,
    ['CPU (cores)'] = cpu,
    ['Memory (Gi)'] = memory

panels.description:
For the entire Azure Container App.

Revision Count x Replica Count x Reserved Cores = Total Reserved Cores
panels.title: Max Total Reserved Cores

panels.description:
For container app revisions. 

Allocated CPU x Replica Count = Max Reserved Cores
panels.title: Max Reserved Cores

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId =~ '$sub'
| where resourceGroup =~ '$rg'
| where type =~ '$ns'
| where name =~ '$res'
| extend containers = todynamic(properties.template.containers)
| mv-expand containers
| summarize cpu = strcat(sum(todouble(containers.resources.cpu)) * 1000, " m cores")

Resources
| where subscriptionId =~ '$sub'
| where resourceGroup =~ '$rg'
| where type =~ '$ns'
| where name =~ '$res'
| extend containers = todynamic(properties.template.containers)
| mv-expand containers
| summarize memory = strcat(
      sum(
        todouble(substring(containers.resources.memory, 0, strlen(containers.resources.memory) - 2)) 
        * 1000
      ), 
    " MB")

panels.description: Total number of restarts since the replica came online
panels.title: Total Replica Restart Count

Avg Memory Working Set Bytes by Replica (MB)
Avg Network In Bytes vs Network Out Bytes
Avg Network In Bytes by Revision
Avg Network In Bytes by Replica
Avg Network Out Bytes by Revision
Avg Network Out Bytes by Replica
